title: US-Israel Military Operations Against Iran and Death of Supreme Leader Khamenei
description: A major escalation in Middle East tensions involving coordinated US-Israeli military strikes against Iran, targeting nuclear facilities and leadership, coinciding with or resulting in the reported death of Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei
arc: The narrative begins with escalating US-Iran tensions and reports of military strikes, progresses through coordinated US-Israeli operations targeting Iranian nuclear facilities and leadership, and culminates in reports of Supreme Leader Khamenei's death. The story encompasses Iranian retaliatory missile attacks, Congressional debates over war powers, and concerns about global oil market disruption. Multiple clusters report variations of the same events, suggesting either conflicting reports or evolving information about the strikes and their outcomes.
